title: Mazars Comment How The Central Banks Finally Pivoted
section_path: Mazars Comment How The Central Banks Finally Pivoted
section_path_text: Mazars Comment How The Central Banks Finally Pivoted
summary:
Main
By George Lagarias
Last week, the ECB hiked twice, defiant of the Credit Suisse debacle. In her initial speech, Christine Lagarde focused solely on inflation, refusing to acknowledge rising financial risks. During the Q&A, where she appeared somewhat less certain, she declined that interest rate tightening has led to a financial accident, citing idiosyncratic issues in the banks that went under.
